message:
fix(core): respect UTF-8 char boundaries when truncating wezterm stderr

Convert stderr bytes to string first via from_utf8_lossy(), then
truncate the string at a char boundary. Previous code sliced raw bytes
at 8KB which could split multi-byte UTF-8 characters, corrupting
diagnostic output with replacement characters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
